reviews.review_description: I'm a youtuber, and I can get you more players, so pls can I get a mod, and it is really good, ps power.vr.Official

It’s not good for many reasons one reason is horror is not even a horror bro really just made a big area for no reason second reason the shop is terrible There is like no cosmetics and the shop music is even worse third reason there’s like nothing to do in the game the game is already dead before it began Do not get this game it will be a waste of your time

developer_response.body:
lil bro thought he did smth pipe down until you can make a better game lol /j 

in all seriousness though I know, i quit on this version and started a new version instead, this one is much better, this one only sucks because at the time i was very new to how game development works. Now I am much more experienced and the new version will be much better, I do appreciate your critism and i will improve on these mistakes, regards - Stronk
